roles.title: Engineering Manager, Agent Platform
roles.why_match: Directly leads the strategic development of Claude's autonomous/agentic capabilities and owns the evaluation frameworks and infrastructure for complex multi-step AI workflows — aligns squarely with priority #1 (Director/VP AI Platform Engineering) and priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with explicit AI/agent platform scope). The candidate's background running a large engineering org and pivoting to AI leadership is a strong fit for this team-building, cross-functional leadership role.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Research Data Platform
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Owns the data platform infrastructure that all of Anthropic's AI research depends on — training runs, evals, RL transcripts, annotations. Maps to priority #2 (Head of Quality Engineering for AI/ML systems) and #5 (senior Engineering Manager focused on AI/ML infra). A Director-level quality engineering leader who understands data quality and platform reliability at scale is well-suited.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Agent Prompts & Evals
roles.why_match: Owns the eval frameworks, system prompt pipelines, and regression-detection systems gating every Claude model launch. This is directly analogous to a Head of Quality Engineering for AI/ML systems (priority #2). A Director of Quality Engineering with 21+ years experience leading evaluation and quality assurance org is a natural match.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Platform Foundations
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Leads teams building the foundational product infrastructure serving all of Anthropic's products at scale across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Aligns with priority #1 (Director/VP AI Platform Engineering) and #4 (Director/VP Engineering with AI scope). The candidate's large-org engineering leadership experience in a regulated (financial services) environment is directly relevant given the role's emphasis on regulated environments and data-residency requirements.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Enterprise Foundations
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Builds and scales the enterprise admin, billing, identity, and deployment infrastructure enabling Fortune 500 companies to adopt Claude — including regulated industries like financial services and healthcare. The candidate's current Director-level role at a large financial institution maps tightly to this role's explicit regulated-industry focus, and aligns with priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with AI scope).

roles.title: Head of Applied AI Architecture, Beneficial Deployments
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY
roles.why_match: A senior technical leadership role that requires building and scaling a globally distributed team of Applied AI Architects and setting AI deployment strategy across mission-driven organizations. Aligns with priority #3 (AI Transformation Lead) and priority #4. The candidate's org leadership experience (~40 people) and pivot toward AI leadership makes this a strong fit, especially given the emphasis on team structure, career development, and strategic vision.

roles.title: Head of Forward Deployed Engineering
roles.why_match: Leads a team of elite engineers who embed with strategic customers to drive enterprise-scale AI transformation and production deployment of custom agents. Reporting to the Global Head of Applied AI, this is a direct AI Transformation Lead / Program Lead role (priority #3) requiring the ability to build and scale a technical org — closely matching the candidate's 21+ year engineering leadership background and pivot toward AI.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager, Research
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Defines and builds cross-functional programs spanning compute, evals, RL environments, and emerging AI research initiatives, acting as connective tissue between research, engineering, and product. Maps to priority #3 (AI Program Lead). The candidate's large-org program orchestration experience and quality/platform leadership background translate well to this senior TPM role at the frontier of AI development.

roles.title: Technical Program Manager, Safeguards (Infrastructure & Evals)
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Owns the operational health of the safety-critical classification, detection, and evaluation infrastructure for Anthropic's AI systems in production — directly analogous to a Head of Quality Engineering for AI/ML systems (priority #2). The candidate's quality engineering background, especially in a regulated financial environment where reliability is non-negotiable, is a strong differentiator for this role.

roles.title: Manager of Applied AI Architecture, Enterprise Tech
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY (hybrid)
roles.why_match: Leads the pre-sales Solutions Architect team driving frontier AI adoption across the world's most sophisticated technology companies. Aligns with priority #5 (senior Solutions Architect / leadership-track AI role). The candidate's financial-services enterprise background and engineering org leadership (21+ years) are directly relevant to this team-building, executive-presence-heavy leadership role.
